pipeline_version: alpha-hunter v1 + 8 sweeps + FDR + bootstrap + strikes + 20-agent gauntlet (v16) + wave-5 robustness gate (v17) + wave-7 v22 4Q reckoning (2026-05-19)

tier_legend.A_STRUCTURAL: Strike-family + FDR. Implication-bounded → tautological cointegration. Size 13%.
tier_legend.A_GOLD: Cross-theme + FDR-q05 + bootstrap-ROBUST. Highest novelty + statistical strength. Size 15%.
tier_legend.B_VALIDATED: FDR-q05 with cross-theme OR bootstrap-robust. Size 10%.

caveats: OOS Sharpes are walk-forward Sharpes; transaction costs not deducted.
After 30-50 bp Polymarket round-trip, divide gross Sharpe by ~1.5-2x for net.
FDR via Benjamini-Hochberg over 1096 permutation tests at q=0.05/0.10.
Bootstrap CI = stationary block bootstrap on OOS PnL; ROBUST means ci_low > 0.
Strike-family pairs are tautologically cointegrated (implication bound).
Cross-theme pairs are the genuinely novel alpha (no obvious driver).
Re-validate weekly; old markets may stop trading.

strategies.a_name: Fed funds upper bound = 4.0% at end-2026
strategies.b_name: Fed funds upper bound = 4.5% at end-2026
strategies.rationale: Strike-family structural cointegration. Implication: P(higher_strike) ≤ P(lower_strike) → spread bounded. ½-life 1.0d.
strategies.best_market_conditions: FOMC blackout windows; stable rate-path consensus
strategies.worst_market_conditions: Surprise CPI/NFP print; emergency Fed action

deploy_signal_logic.entry: if |z_t| >= 2.0 -> open opposite-sign position sized by suggested_allocation
deploy_signal_logic.stop_loss: if |z_t| >= 4.0 -> hard stop and pause for 1 half-life

kill_switch_rules: halt if observed half-life > 3x backtest (2.8d) on rolling 30d
halt if either leg's Polymarket liquidity < $10k bid-ask depth
halt if ADF p-value on rolling 60-day window > 0.20 (cointegration broken)
halt if cumulative drawdown breaches 1.5x worst_drawdown_observed
halt if either market is flagged for resolution dispute or oracle delay
halt if strike ordering inverts (P(higher) > P(lower)) for >24h
strategies.tier_change_reason: wave-6 (2026-05-19): bootstrap-CI gate (lo>0, width>0.5) not satisfied

strategies.tier_change_reason: wave-7 v22 (2026-05-19): fails 4Q stability gate per docs/alpha-reports/alpha-report-v22.md — joint_days=133 < 360 required; insufficient joint Polymarket history for 4 disjoint quarters. Q-Sharpe pattern: 2.61 / 2.96 / INSUF / INSUF. Re-test 2026-06-19, 2026-07-19, 2026-08-19.
strategies.joint_obs_metric_note: n_obs=91 = aligned non-NaN trading data points; joint_calendar_days_v22=133 = calendar span of joint contract coverage per v22 §2 (includes data gaps). Both metrics fall well short of the 4Q threshold.

deploy_signal_logic.entry: if |z_t| >= 2.0 -> open opposite-sign position sized by suggested_allocation
deploy_signal_logic.stop_loss: if |z_t| >= 4.0 -> hard stop and pause for 1 half-life

kill_switch_rules: halt if observed half-life > 3x backtest (8.2d) on rolling 30d
halt if either leg's Polymarket liquidity < $10k bid-ask depth
halt if ADF p-value on rolling 60-day window > 0.20 (cointegration broken)
halt if cumulative drawdown breaches 1.5x worst_drawdown_observed
halt if either market is flagged for resolution dispute or oracle delay

session_summary.main_finding: Wave-5 robustness gate eliminates ALL A_GOLD entries. Only 2 of 8 prior A_GOLD survive even into B_VALIDATED. Headline drops from "+50k/yr on 10k" to roughly "+3-5k/yr after honest stress tests" — the rest is regime-driven or insufficient-data.
session_summary.recommended_portfolio: 15% PCA-residual (china_taiwan basket) + 10% calendar-λ (gold-stem capped) + 75% CASH. Expected net Sharpe ~1.5, ~+3-5k/yr on $10k.

v17_summary.criterion_a_gold: stable Sharpe ≥4/6 quarters AND CI95 LB > 0 AND BH-FDR pass
v17_summary.criterion_b_validated: ≥3 quarters positive OR CI95 LB > 0 OR live arb signal
v17_summary.note: Strict v17 gate yields 0 A_GOLD because data span (~3 quarters) cannot meet "≥4 of 6 quarters" criterion. The honest answer is no alpha is yet rigorously deploy-ready — only paper-tradeable.

v22_reckoning_note: Per docs/alpha-reports/alpha-report-v22.md (2026-05-19): all 5 Wave-6 A_STRUCTURAL promotions reverted to B_VALIDATED because joint_days < 360 (none has 4 disjoint quarters of Polymarket history). Earliest legitimate re-test is late Aug 2026.
